content.description: Rendering system for the viewport. Resolves views, renders items to DOM, manages re-renders and reactive updates. Enriches the base kernel API with rendering methods when rendering views.

getViewConfig.name: getViewConfig
getViewConfig.description: Get the view config for an item from its render context (attachment spec or viewport).

updateViewConfig.name: updateViewConfig
updateViewConfig.description: Update the view config for an item (merges into parent's attachment spec or viewport).

params.name: updates
params.description: Key-value pairs to merge into the config

restorePreviousView.name: restorePreviousView
restorePreviousView.description: Restore the previous view for an item (undo setAttachmentView or setRootView).

returns.description: True if a previous view was restored

parseSourceLocation.name: parseSourceLocation
parseSourceLocation.description: Parse a stack trace to extract the source item name and line number.

createElement.name: createElement
createElement.description: Create a DOM element with JSX-like syntax.

params.name: children
params.description: Child nodes, strings, or [tag, props, children] arrays

params.name: debugCtx
params.description: Debug attribution context {containerItem, context, debugMode, parseSourceLocation}

baseCreateElement.name: baseCreateElement
baseCreateElement.description:
Base createElement without debug attribution.
Installed on the kernel API before boot-complete so all handlers can use it.

extractViewConfig.name: extractViewConfig
extractViewConfig.description: Extract view ID and config from a viewIdOrConfig parameter.

params.name: viewIdOrConfig
params.description: View GUID, config object {type, ...}, or null

RenderInstanceRegistry.name: RenderInstanceRegistry
RenderInstanceRegistry.description:
Render Instance Registry — tracks what's currently rendered on screen.
Indexes instances by itemId, viewId, and parentId for efficient lookup.

RenderInstanceRegistry.register.name: register
RenderInstanceRegistry.register.description: Register a new render instance and index it.

RenderInstanceRegistry.unregister.name: unregister
RenderInstanceRegistry.unregister.description: Unregister a render instance and remove from all indexes.

RenderInstanceRegistry.unregisterByParen.name: unregisterByParent
RenderInstanceRegistry.unregisterByParen.description: Unregister all instances belonging to a parent.

RenderInstanceRegistry.get.name: get
RenderInstanceRegistry.get.description: Get a render instance by ID.

RenderInstanceRegistry.getByItemId.name: getByItemId
RenderInstanceRegistry.getByItemId.description: Get all render instances for an item.

RenderInstanceRegistry.getByViewId.name: getByViewId
RenderInstanceRegistry.getByViewId.description: Get all render instances using a specific view.

RenderInstanceRegistry.getByParentId.name: getByParentId
RenderInstanceRegistry.getByParentId.description: Get all render instances belonging to a parent.

RenderInstanceRegistry.getSummary.name: getSummary
RenderInstanceRegistry.getSummary.description: Get a summary of current render state.

returns.type: {totalInstances: number, uniqueItems: number, uniqueViews: number, uniqueParents: number

cleanupDOMTree.name: cleanupDOMTree
cleanupDOMTree.description:
Walk a DOM subtree calling registered cleanup functions before removal.
Elements opt in via data-hobson-cleanup attribute and __hobsonCleanup function.

RenderingSystem.name: RenderingSystem
RenderingSystem.description: Rendering system — resolves views, renders items to DOM, and manages re-renders.

RenderingSystem.renderViewport.name: renderViewport
RenderingSystem.renderViewport.description: Render the viewport item into #main-view. Re-entrant safe.

RenderingSystem.enrichAPI.name: enrichAPI
RenderingSystem.enrichAPI.description:
Enrich a base kernel API with rendering methods.
Called by renderItem/renderHobView before passing API to views.

RenderingSystem.parseSourceLocation.name: parseSourceLocation
RenderingSystem.parseSourceLocation.description: Parse a stack trace to extract source item name and line number.

RenderingSystem.cleanupDOMTree.name: cleanupDOMTree
RenderingSystem.cleanupDOMTree.description: Clean up resources in a DOM subtree before removal.

RenderingSystem.clearInstances.name: clearInstances
RenderingSystem.clearInstances.description: Clear all render instances (called before full re-render).

RenderingSystem.rerenderItem.name: rerenderItem
RenderingSystem.rerenderItem.description: Re-render all visible instances of an item in place (partial re-render).

returns.type: Promise<{updated: number, total?: number, notFound?: boolean

RenderingSystem.rerenderByView.name: rerenderByView
RenderingSystem.rerenderByView.description: Re-render all items currently using a specific view.

returns.type: Promise<{updated: number, items?: number, notFound?: boolean

RenderingSystem.rerenderByType.name: rerenderByType
RenderingSystem.rerenderByType.description: Re-render all items of a given type (skips items with their own preferred view).

RenderingSystem.renderItem.name: renderItem
RenderingSystem.renderItem.description: Render an item as a DOM element using a specified or resolved view.

params.name: viewId
params.description: View GUID (null for auto-resolve via preference hierarchy)

RenderingSystem.renderItemInContext.name: renderItemInContext
RenderingSystem.renderItemInContext.description:
Render an item for a parent context: extracts view config, merges context, applies decorator.
Called by api.renderItem — the API-level entry point for rendering a child item.

params.name: viewIdOrConfig
params.description: View GUID, config object {type, ...}, or null

RenderingSystem.resolveView.name: resolveView
RenderingSystem.resolveView.description: Resolve a view using the preference hierarchy: item.preferredView → type.preferredView → type chain.

params.name: item
params.description: The item to find a view for

RenderingSystem.findView.name: findView
RenderingSystem.findView.description: Find a view for a type, walking up the extends chain. Falls back to default-view.

RenderingSystem.getViews.name: getViews
RenderingSystem.getViews.description: Get all views for a type (including inherited from extends chain).

returns.type: Promise<Array<{view: Object, forType: string, inherited: boolean, isDefault?: boolean

RenderingSystem.getDefaultView.name: getDefaultView
RenderingSystem.getDefaultView.description: Get the first view found for a type.

RenderingSystem.getEffectiveView.name: getEffectiveView
RenderingSystem.getEffectiveView.description: Get the view that would be used for a specific item (full preference hierarchy).

RenderingSystem.getTypePreferredView.name: getTypePreferredView
RenderingSystem.getTypePreferredView.description: Get the type-level preferred view (falls back to findView).

RenderingSystem.setPreferredView.name: setPreferredView
RenderingSystem.setPreferredView.description: Set an item's preferred view and re-render. Pass null to clear.

params.name: viewId
params.description: View GUID, or null to clear

RenderingSystem.setTypePreferredView.name: setTypePreferredView
RenderingSystem.setTypePreferredView.description: Set the preferred view for an item's type. Affects all items of that type.

params.name: itemId
params.description: Any item of the type to update

params.name: viewId
params.description: View GUID, or null to clear

RenderingSystem.getContextualView.name: getContextualView
RenderingSystem.getContextualView.description: Get the view configured by a parent's attachment spec for a child item.

returns.description: View GUID from parent's attachment config, or null

RenderingSystem.getTypeName.name: getTypeName
RenderingSystem.getTypeName.description: Get the human-readable type name for an item.

params.name: api
params.description: The kernel API for this render context

RenderingSystem.fillMountPoints.name: fillMountPoints
RenderingSystem.fillMountPoints.description:
Fill :render-child mount points in a DOM tree.
Queries for unfilled mount-point divs, renders each child item into them.

params.name: containerItem
params.description: The parent item (for parentId in child context)

RenderingSystem._loadMorphdom.name: _loadMorphdom
RenderingSystem._loadMorphdom.description: Lazy-load morphdom library (cached on this instance).

RenderingSystem._initReactiveSubscriptio.name: _initReactiveSubscriptions
RenderingSystem._initReactiveSubscriptio.description:
Initialize reactive event subscriptions. Called once on first Hob render.
Uses registry.getByItemId for reactive lookups — no separate dep tracker needed.

RenderingSystem._scheduleReRenders.name: _scheduleReRenders
RenderingSystem._scheduleReRenders.description: Schedule re-renders for instances whose item changed (microtask batched).

RenderingSystem._flushReRenders.name: _flushReRenders
RenderingSystem._flushReRenders.description: Flush all pending re-renders with selector filtering and cycle detection.

RenderingSystem.createErrorView.name: createErrorView
RenderingSystem.createErrorView.description: Create a DOM element showing a render error with an edit button.

params.name: itemId
params.description: Item GUID that failed to render
